items.summary: Leading architecture and design on Hira, a persona-aware Filipino labor-matching platform for blue-collar workers, fresh graduates, and OFWs, built as coursework and drafted into a Design Science Research paper.
description: Hira a course deliverable. The frontend is a Next.js 16 + Tailwind v4 + TypeScript scaffold with a forest-green design system.

The design work was written up as an independent paper, "Persona-Aware Platform Design for Cross-Segment Labor Market Integration in the Philippines," with plans to adapt it into competition proposals.
bullets: Completed a full DSR paper draft for independent publication
achievements: Completed a full DSR paper draft for independent publication

items.summary: Built LoadSense, an edge-AI + cloud occupancy platform for Philippine jeepneys, with Team FlowerBoys. Placed Top 6 in the Smart Cities track and Top 40 overall.
description: LoadSense uses a YOLOv8-nano model to count boarding and alighting passengers on public utility vehicles, mapping the live count to a four-tier occupancy state shown on a windshield LED strip so waiting commuters can see at a glance whether a jeepney has room.

A FastAPI + SQLite cloud layer ingests GPS and occupancy telemetry to predict ETA, forecast route demand, flag route deviations and driving anomalies, and drives an operator console with a live fleet map (Leaflet) and an alert verification workflow.
Despite Our team not moving to finals, we are grateful to have been given the opportunity to participate in such event and we have learned a lot from this Hackathon.
bullets: Top 6, Smart Cities track — ASEAN AI Hackathon 2026
Advanced to and competed up to the virtual semi-finals
achievements: Top 6, Smart Cities track — ASEAN AI Hackathon 2026
Advanced to and competed up to the virtual semi-finals

items.summary: Built a Naive Bayes classifier that flags fraudulent/phishing emails and prompt-injection attempts, with a custom 300-row labeled dataset and a Streamlit app for the final defense.
description: Designed a custom CSV dataset spanning safe, fraudulent, and prompt-injection email samples, then built text-feature extraction and a Naive Bayes classifier around it.
Wrapped the model in a Streamlit app for live demonstration during the course defense.
bullets: Built and labeled a 300-row custom email dataset across three classes
Implemented Naive Bayes classification with custom text-feature extraction
Shipped a Streamlit demo app for the finals defense
achievements: Completed as a solo finals project for Intelligent Systems

items.summary: Studying Computer Science with a specialization in AI/ML, working across data analytics, algorithms, coursework and many more.
bullets: Top 6, Smart Cities track, ASEAN AI Hackathon 2026 (Team FlowerBoys)
achievements: Top 6, Smart Cities track, ASEAN AI Hackathon 2026 (Team FlowerBoys)
